---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

### Joining datasets

#### 1. Join hazard history and service requests to get a list of requests made after a severe weather event

```{r}
library(fuzzyjoin)
```

```{r}
#use fuzzyjoin to get all service requests within 24 hours of a storm (before and after)
storm_service_requests <- difference_join(hazard_history, service_requests,
                                          by = c("DateTime"),
                                          max_dist = 86400,
                                          distance_col = "diff")

#restrict to only service requests after a storm starts
storm_service_requests <- subset(storm_service_requests, DateTime.y >= DateTime.x)
```

```{r}
#select relevant variables
storm_service_requests <- storm_service_requests %>%
  select("storm_event_id", "storm_date", "storm_name", "storm_issues", "tree_condition", "reported_tree_condition", "borough", "address", "location_details", "service_request_date", "geometry")
```

#### 2. Join storm service requests with tree map data to get species and size of each serviced tree

```{r}
#join by nearest feature - matches serviced tree locations (planting spaces) to the closest tree coordinates given in the tree map
storm_service_requests <- st_as_sf(storm_service_requests)

serviced_trees <- st_join(storm_service_requests, tree_map, join = st_nearest_feature)
```

```{r}
#selecting and rearranging relevant columns
serviced_trees <- serviced_trees %>%
  select("tree_id", "stump_diameter", "species_common", "species_scientific", "borough", "closest_address", "geometry", "service_request_date", "storm_date", "storm_event_id", "storm_issues", "tree_condition")
```

```{r}
#reformatting storm dates to include times
serviced_trees$storm_date <- format(serviced_trees$storm_date, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
```

```{r}
#save files
write.csv(storm_service_requests, "storm_service_requests.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(serviced_trees, "serviced_trees.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

Adding estimates of height for each tree based on diameter at breast height

```{r}
height_eqs <- read_csv("height_equations.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# data table for all four types of equations
calc_height <- function(dbh, model, B0, B1, B2) {
  case_when(
    model == "B0 + (DBH * B1) + (DBH^2 * B2)" ~ B0 + (dbh * B1) + (dbh^2 * B2),
    model == "e^(B0 + (ln(DBH) * B1))"        ~ exp(B0 + (log(dbh) * B1)),
    model == "B0 + (DBH * B1)"                ~ B0 + (dbh * B1),
    model == "B0 + (ln(DBH) * B1)"            ~ B0 + (log(dbh) * B1),
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )
}
```

```{r}
# Split coefficients by taxonomic level
species_eqs <- height_eqs %>% filter(level == "Species") %>%
  select(species_scientific = taxon, model, B0, B1, B2)
genus_eqs   <- height_eqs %>% filter(level == "Genus") %>%
  select(genus = taxon, model, B0, B1, B2)
```

```{r}
serviced_trees <- serviced_trees %>%
  mutate(genus = word(species_scientific, 1))
```

```{r}
trees_matched <- serviced_trees %>%
  left_join(species_eqs, by = "species_scientific") %>%
  left_join(genus_eqs, by = "genus", suffix = c("", "_genus")) %>%
  mutate(
    model = coalesce(model, model_genus),
    B0 = coalesce(B0, B0_genus),
    B1 = coalesce(B1, B1_genus),
    B2 = coalesce(B2, B2_genus)
  ) %>%
  select(-ends_with("_genus"))
```

```{r}
trees_with_height <- trees_matched %>%
  mutate(height = calc_height(stump_diameter, model, B0, B1, B2))
```

```{r}
serviced_trees$species_scientific <- gsub("Platanus x acerifolia", "Platanus x acerfolia", serviced_trees$species_scientific)
```
